nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief guide to the RisingWave configuration system, explaining the `risingwave.toml` format and how to use config profiles with the RiseDev developer tool.

nodes.name: ci-backfill.toml
nodes.summary: CI-specific configuration overrides for backfill testing, adjusting streaming developer options, storage settings, and object store retry parameters.

nodes.name: ci-compaction-test-meta.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration for meta-node compaction tests, tuning compaction scheduler, storage, and hummock settings for test environments.

nodes.name: ci-compaction-test.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration for storage compaction tests, overriding compaction trigger thresholds and storage layer parameters for intensive test coverage.

nodes.name: ci-jdbc-to-native.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration profile for JDBC-to-native connector migration tests, setting streaming and batch parameters appropriate for connector testing.

nodes.name: ci-ldap-search-bind-filter.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration enabling LDAP authentication with search-bind mode and attribute filter settings for testing LDAP integration in the CI environment.

nodes.name: ci-ldap-search-bind-url.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration enabling LDAP authentication with search-bind mode using a URL-based LDAP connection for CI authentication tests.

nodes.name: ci-ldap-search-bind.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration enabling LDAP authentication with search-bind mode for testing LDAP-based access control in the CI pipeline.

nodes.name: ci-ldap-simple-bind-url.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration enabling LDAP authentication with simple-bind mode and URL-based connection string for CI LDAP integration tests.

nodes.name: ci-ldap-simple-bind.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration enabling LDAP simple-bind authentication for testing basic LDAP login flows in the CI environment.

nodes.name: ci-longer-streaming-upload-timeout.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration with increased streaming upload timeout thresholds to accommodate slow object storage in CI environments.

nodes.name: ci-mem.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration tuning memory limits and eviction settings to constrain memory usage during memory-sensitive CI test scenarios.

nodes.name: ci-meta-backup-test.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration for meta-service backup/restore testing, enabling periodic meta backup with a short interval.

nodes.name: ci-recovery.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration tuned for failure-recovery testing, adjusting checkpoint intervals and streaming recovery parameters.

nodes.name: ci-sim-log-store.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration for simulation tests using the in-memory log store backend instead of object storage.

nodes.name: ci-sim.toml
nodes.summary: CI simulation test configuration providing lightweight overrides suitable for deterministic madsim-based integration tests.

nodes.name: ci-single-node-standalone.toml
nodes.summary: Minimal CI configuration for single-node standalone mode tests, with reduced resource settings for the all-in-one binary.

nodes.name: ci-time-travel.toml
nodes.summary: CI configuration enabling time-travel query features for testing historical data access in the CI pipeline.

nodes.name: ci.toml
nodes.summary: Base CI configuration file with shared settings for server, batch, streaming, and storage components used across all CI test profiles.

nodes.name: docs.md
nodes.summary: Auto-generated reference documentation listing all configurable parameters across RisingWave server, batch, streaming, storage, and system modules with their default values and descriptions.
